title: The Unsolved Case of the Zodiac Killer

segments.text: From 1968 to 1969, the Zodiac Killer terrorized Northern California.
He claimed responsibility for multiple murders and sent taunting letters.
Despite numerous investigations, the killer was never caught.
The case has captivated amateur sleuths and detectives alike.
The identity of the Zodiac Killer remains one of America's greatest mysteries.
A chilling case that continues to haunt the public's imagination.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: Between 1968 and 1969, the Zodiac Killer was responsible for several murders, and remains unidentified. Follow for daily cold cases! 🕵️
